records.question: What actors named Elias Koteas have ethnicity exactly White?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actorid FROM actor
JOIN characters ON actor.actorid = characters.actorid
WHERE actor.name = 'Elias Koteas' AND actor.ethnicity = 'White'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ActorID FROM actor AS T1 WHERE T1.Name = 'Elias Koteas' AND T1.Ethnicity = 'White' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM characters AS T2 WHERE T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID )

records.question: Which actors named Adam Hann-Byrd appeared with a credit order of at least 9 in the Family movie Jumanji, where the rating is exactly 7.0, runtime is at least 104 minutes, budget is at most 65000000, and gross is at least 262797249?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actorid FROM actor
JOIN characters ON actor.actorid = characters.actorid
JOIN movie ON characters.movieid = movie.movieid
WHERE movie.gross >= 262797249.0 AND actor.name = 'Adam Hann-Byrd' AND movie.genre = 'Family' AND movie.title = 'Jumanji' AND movie.rating = 7.0 AND movie.runtime >= 104 AND characters.creditorder >= 9 AND movie.budget <= 65000000
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ActorID FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.MovieID = T3.MovieID WHERE T1.Name = 'Adam Hann-Byrd' AND T2.creditOrder >= 9 AND T3.Gross >= 262797249.0 AND T3.Genre = 'Family' AND T3.Title = 'Jumanji' AND T3.Rating = 7.0 AND T3.Runtime >= 104 AND T3.Budget <= 65000000

records.question: Which White male actors named Robert Wuhl have a net worth containing '000' and have characters with at least credit order 4 and screentime exactly 0:08:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actorid FROM actor
JOIN characters ON actor.actorid = characters.actorid
WHERE actor.ethnicity = 'White' AND characters.creditorder >= 4 AND characters.screentime = '0:08:45' AND actor.networth LIKE '%000%' AND actor.name = 'Robert Wuhl' AND actor.gender = 'Male'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ActorID FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Ethnicity = 'White' AND T1.NetWorth LIKE '%000%' AND T1.Name = 'Robert Wuhl' AND T1.Gender = 'Male' AND T2.creditOrder >= 4 AND T2.screentime = '0:08:45'

records.question: Who acted in Bram Stoker's Dracula, the movie that grossed exactly 215900000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actorid FROM actor
JOIN characters ON actor.actorid = characters.actorid
JOIN movie ON characters.movieid = movie.movieid
WHERE movie.title = 'Bram Stoker''s Dracula' AND movie.gross = 215900000.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ActorID FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID INNER JOIN movie AS T3 ON T2.MovieID = T3.MovieID WHERE T3.Title = 'Bram Stoker' AND T3.Gross = 215900000
